text: Patient diagnosed with type 2 diabetes mellitus without complications.
notes: Baseline test. Both ontologies should confirm.

text: Essential hypertension noted during routine examination. Blood pressure 160/95.
notes: Common condition. Short ICD code (3 characters).

text: Blood cultures confirmed sepsis caused by gram-negative bacteria. Patient transferred to ICU.
notes: Acute condition. Tests extraction from clinical narrative.

text: CT scan revealed malignant neoplasm of the right upper lobe of the lung.
notes: Cancer diagnosis. Code specificity may vary.

text: Progressive cognitive decline consistent with Alzheimer disease. MRI shows cortical atrophy.
notes: Neurodegenerative condition.

text: Patient presents with major depressive disorder, single episode. PHQ-9 score of 18.
notes: Mental health condition with clinical assessment tool mentioned.

text: Acute exacerbation of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease requiring supplemental oxygen.
notes: COPD with exacerbation qualifier.

text: Pasienten ble innlagt med mistanke om sepsis. Blodkulturer viste vekst av E. coli.
notes: Norwegian clinical text. Tests language detection and entity extraction.

text: Pasienten har kjent diabetes type 2 og hypertensjon. Medisinlisten inkluderer metformin og losartan.
notes: Norwegian text with two conditions and medications.

text: Rtg thorax viser bilaterale infiltrater forenlig med pneumoni. CRP 285.
notes: Norwegian radiology finding.

text: Kronisk nyresykdom stadium 5. Pasienten er satt opp for dialysestart.
notes: Norwegian end-stage renal disease.

text: The weather today is sunny with a high of 25 degrees. Several new restaurants opened downtown.
notes: No medical content. System should return zero entities.

text: The quarterly earnings report showed strong growth in the technology sector. Stock prices rose 3%.
notes: Financial text. Zero medical entities expected.

text: The patient was diagnosed with chronic floxitremia and acute bornholmitis of the left ventricle.
notes: Invented medical conditions. System should flag these as ungrounded or not extract them.

text: Type 2 diabetes mellitus. ICD-10 code: E10.9.
notes: E10.9 is Type 1, not Type 2. Tests whether system catches code mismatch.

text: Patient has essential hypertension. Code assigned: G30.9.
notes: G30.9 is Alzheimer, not hypertension. Tests code-description mismatch detection.

text: Post-COVID condition with persistent fatigue and cognitive impairment lasting 6 months.
notes: Recent ICD code. Tests coverage of newer entries.

text: Hereditary hemochromatosis confirmed by genetic testing. Ferritin level 1200 ng/mL.
notes: Less common condition with specific code.

text: Patient reports persistent headache and dizziness for the past two weeks.
notes: Symptoms, not diagnoses. Tests whether system assigns symptom codes (R51, R42) rather than disease codes.

text: Chest pain on exertion. No ST changes on ECG. Troponin negative.
notes: Symptom with negative workup. Tests appropriate coding of undifferentiated symptoms.
